item.name: Crabe de la Crabe
item.description:
If it were any crabbier, it would...probably still be a crab.

Use item to acquire the crabe de la crabe minion.
item.tooltip:
If yer playin' us false, I'll be
back to feed the crabs with
yer lyin' tongue.
   - Rostnsthal
item.specialactiondescription:
Renders all allies within range immune to attacks by monsters.
Duration: 5s
